title: Yosys fails to parse two-level-deep function calls in always_comb if the second call reads a field.

features.name: nested function call in always_comb reading field
features.description: Code should include a two-level-deep nested function call inside an always_comb block where the inner function reads a field from the parent scope

features.name: function return via self-assignment with nested call
features.description: Code should include a function that returns a value by self-assigning the result of another function call
